title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma…) with a single CLI or REST API; macOS/Linux/Windows images included.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and asyncio wrapper for the Ollama REST API; sync & async chat, embed, pull, list.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; promises & streams, same coverage as Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package giving ChatOllama, OllamaEmbeddings, OllamaFunctions and callbacks.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-like web UI for any Ollama model; multi-user, markdown, code highlight, RAG uploads.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builders, streaming, async, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with readline, syntax highlighting, conversation history and model switching.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a free local GitHub Copilot with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal React chatbot component that proxies to Ollama; easy iframe or Next.js integration.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented-Generation template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain in Docker.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-affinity and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Official CUDA-enabled container image for Ollama with automatic GPU runtime detection.

title: ollama-kt
summary: Lightweight Kotlin multiplatform wrapper for Ollama, supports JVM, Android and native targets.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that exposes an OpenAI-like REST endpoint backed by Ollama for rapid prototyping.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client and CLI for Ollama.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library for Ollama with async streaming, dependency-injection helpers, and Blazor sample.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that wraps Ollama for multi-user chat history and admin panel model management.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes using Ollama; templates and command palette.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt bot that answers channel questions via Ollama; supports threads, app mentions and streaming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.
